title: DMA / SAOS experiment record (stable interchange schema)
description: Stable DMA / SAOS interchange schema with segmented canonical measurement tables, optional raw-signal supplements, optional external URIs for large datasets, interfacial support, and compact QC metadata.

uncertainty.description: Optional 1-sigma or reported half-width uncertainties using the same units as the parent fields.

experiment_mode.description: High-level experimental modality used to route parsing, UI defaults, and validation expectations.

experiment_id.description: Unique record identifier (UUID, LIMS key, or lab code).

ended_at.description: ISO 8601 experiment end time, if known.

replicate_group_id.description: Shared identifier for nominally replicated records.

export_source.description: Human-readable export source such as manual_entry, vendor_csv, or parquet_bundle.

material.description: Short material identifier or specimen name.

material_description.description: Longer free-text description of polymer, blend, filler, lot, or specimen history.

geometry.description: Shape-coupled geometry. The branch determines which dimensional fields are valid.

strain_uniformity.description: Expected strain uniformity in the loaded geometry.

dimensions_mm.description: Film specimens may be circular (punched disk) or rectangular strips.

strain_uniformity.description: Expected strain uniformity in the loaded geometry.
Expected strain uniformity in the loaded geometry.
Expected strain uniformity in the loaded geometry.

dimensions_mm.description: Optional characteristic dimensions for probe, trough, or film extent.

strain_uniformity.description: Expected strain uniformity in the loaded geometry.
Expected strain uniformity in the loaded geometry.

reference_transitions.description: Reference thermal transitions supplied from DSC, literature, or prior characterization.

molecular_characteristics.description: Optional polymer metadata useful for correlation studies, not required for a valid interchange record.

segments.description: Ordered protocol/data segments. Use one segment for a simple single-protocol experiment.

raw_signals.description: Optional raw time-series supplement. Parallel array lengths are not enforced by Draft 07.

shift_factor_kind.description: How shift factor values are encoded to prevent ambiguity across tools.

value.description: Shift factor value; interpret using shift_factor_kind.

extensions.description: Namespaced lab- or domain-specific payloads outside the stable core contract.
